title: Listening: Meeting Friends and Family
learningGoal: Understand spoken sentences identifying people and objects, and accurately parse the difference between formal and informal pronouns.
instructions: Listen to Amit introduce his friend to his family. Pay very close attention to which version of 'You' (Aap vs Tum) he uses when talking to his grandfather versus his friend.
listeningGoal: Identify formal and informal pronouns, adjectives, and plural demonstratives in a spoken context.
audioScenario: Amit brings his friend Rahul to his home.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: अमित: नमस्ते दादाजी। आप कैसे हैं?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Amit: Namaste Dadaji. Aap kaise hain?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Amit: Hello Grandfather. How are you?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: दादाजी: नमस्ते अमित। मैं अच्छा हूँ। यह कौन है?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Dadaji: Namaste Amit. Main achchha hoon. Yeh kaun hai?
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Grandfather: Hello Amit. I am good. Who is this?

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: अमित: यह मेरा दोस्त है। इसका नाम राहुल है।
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Amit: Yeh mera dost hai. Iska naam Rahul hai.
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Amit: This is my friend. His name is Rahul.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: अमित: राहुल, तुम अंदर आओ। ये किताबें हैं। घर बड़ा है।
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Amit: Rahul, tum andar aao. Ye kitaabein hain. Ghar bada hai.
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Amit: Rahul, you come inside. These are books. The house is big.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: राहुल: हाँ, गाड़ी भी बहुत अच्छी है।
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Rahul: Haan, gaadi bhi bahut achchhi hai.
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Rahul: Yes, the car is also very good.

audioTranscriptFull: नमस्ते दादाजी। आप कैसे हैं? नमस्ते अमित। मैं अच्छा हूँ। यह कौन है? यह मेरा दोस्त है। इसका नाम राहुल है। नमस्ते दादाजी। राहुल, तुम अंदर आओ। ये किताबें हैं। घर बड़ा है। हाँ, गाड़ी भी बहुत अच्छी है।

questionSet.questionText: When Amit speaks to his Grandfather, which pronoun does he use?
What does the Grandfather ask about Rahul?
When Amit tells Rahul to come inside, what pronoun does he use for his friend?
What does Amit point out using the plural 'Ye' (ये)?
How does Rahul describe the car?

feedbackRules.onPass: Awesome listening skills! You caught the social dynamics perfectly.
feedbackRules.onFail: Listen to the pronouns Amit uses. For an elder (Dadaji), he uses Aap. For a friend (Rahul), he uses Tum.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Note that the word 'Kaun' means 'Who'. 'Kya' means 'What'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: नमस्ते दादाजी। आप कैसे हैं? नमस्ते अमित। मैं अच्छा हूँ। यह कौन है? यह मेरा दोस्त है। इसका नाम राहुल है। नमस्ते दादाजी। राहुल, तुम अंदर आओ। ये किताबें हैं। घर बड़ा है। हाँ, गाड़ी भी बहुत अच्छी है।

hintText: Pay attention to the tone. It shifts from very respectful (Aap) to casual (Tum).
